message:
feat(mux-server): add PDU handlers for layout swap, cycle, and stack operations

Wire up five new mux server PDU handlers in SessionHandler to support
the layout management features added in the GUI layer:

- SwapToLayout: swap tab to a specific layout by index
- SetLayoutCycle: configure a named layout cycle (grid-4, main-side,
  stacked, main-bottom) on a tab
- CycleStack: cycle through panes in a stacked layout slot
- SelectStackPane: stub acknowledging pane selection (not yet wired)
- UpdatePaneConstraints: stub acknowledging constraint updates (local-only)

All handlers follow the existing spawn_into_main_thread + catch pattern
and return UnitResponse on success.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
